Bash(node -e " const lines = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin', 'utf8'\).trim\(\).split\('\\n'\).slice\(1\); // Union-Find const parent = new Map\(\); function find\(x\) { if \(!parent.has\(x\)\) parent.set\(x, x\); if \(parent.get\(x\) !== x\) parent.set\(x, find\(parent.get\(x\)\)\); return parent.get\(x\); } function union\(a, b\) { const ra = find\(a\), rb = find\(b\); if \(ra !== rb\) parent.set\(ra, rb\); } for \(const line of lines\) { const parts = line.split\(','\); if \(parts.length < 3\) continue; const [n1, , n2] = parts; union\(n1.trim\(\).toUpperCase\(\), n2.trim\(\).toUpperCase\(\)\); } // Group by root const groups = new Map\(\); for \(const name of parent.keys\(\)\) { const root = find\(name\); if \(!groups.has\(root\)\) groups.set\(root, new Set\(\)\); groups.get\(root\).add\(name\); } const result = [...groups.values\(\)] .map\(s => [...s].sort\(\)\) .filter\(g => g.length > 1\) .sort\(\(a, b\) => a[0].localeCompare\(b[0]\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(result, null, 2\)\); " wc -l src/nicknames.json node -e "const d = require\('./src/nicknames.json'\); console.log\('groups:', d.length, 'total entries:', d.reduce\(\(n,g\)=>n+g.length,0\)\);")
